# Appointments

Operations related to appointments. Appointments are bookings for services that can be rescheduled, cancelled, and confirmed.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/appointments` | List appointments. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/appointments/store` | Create appointment. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}` | Get appointment. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}` | Update appointment. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}/3dh-tour-link` | Get appointment 3D Home Capture link. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}/accept` | Accept appointment. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}/availability` | Check appointment availability. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}/cancel` | Cancel appointment. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}/decline` | Decline appointment. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}/postpone` | Postpone appointment. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}/reschedule` | Reschedule appointment. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/appointments/{appointment_id}/schedule` | Schedule appointment. | Bearer token required |

## `GET /appointments`

List appointments.

List appointments. By default, returns a list of appointments that have been scheduled and have not been canceled

- Operation ID: `get-appointments`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `AppointmentCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `include` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of optional data to include in the response. |
| `filter[tense]` | `query` | No | enum (`PAST`, `UPCOMING`) | Return appointments that are upcoming or in the past. |
| `filter[statuses][]` | `query` | No | array of enum (`SCHEDULED`, `UNSCHEDULED`, `CANCELED`) | Filters appointment by status, defaults to SCHEDULED. |
| `filter[start_at_gte]` | `query` | No | string (date-time) | Return appointments where the start_at field is greater than or equal to this value. Effectively, appointments that start after this date. |
| `filter[start_at_lte]` | `query` | No | string (date-time) | Return appointments where the start_at field is less than or equal to this value. Effectively, appointments that start before this date. |
| `filter[user_ids][]` | `query` | No | array of string (uuid) | The IDs of users whose appointments will be listed. UUID Version 4. |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of fields used for sorting. Placing a minus symbol in front of a field name sorts in descending order. Defaults to `-start_at`. |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | string | The number of items per page. Defaults to 25. |
| `page` | `query` | No | string | The requested page. Defaults to 1. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | AppointmentCollection | `application/json`: `AppointmentCollection` |
| `403` | ApiError403 | `application/json`: `ApiError403` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |

## `PUT /appointments/{appointment_id}/cancel`

Cancel appointment.

Cancel appointment. The appointments order's customer can be optionally notified of this change.

- Operation ID: `put-appointments-appointment-id-cancel`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError409`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `AppointmentCancelPutPayload`, `AppointmentResource`
